description_long: This is a hand axe featuring a robust, slightly curved wooden handle and a solid, dark metal head. The handle appears to be made from a single piece of wood, showing a natural grain and a smooth, ergonomic curve for comfortable gripping. The axe head is wedge-shaped with a broad, flat poll and a single sharp cutting edge, designed for chopping or splitting wood. The blade is securely mounted onto the handle, with the wood visible through the eye of the head, indicating a traditional wedged attachment. The surface of the metal head is matte and slightly rough, while the wooden handle has a worn, matte finish. No visible markings, engravings, or labels are present on either the handle or the blade.
description: A hand axe with a curved wooden handle and a dark, wedge-shaped metal head, designed for chopping tasks. The handle is smooth and ergonomic, while the blade is robust and securely mounted.
description_view_0: The axe is seen from an angle highlighting the top of the head and the curvature of the wooden handle.
description_view_1: This view shows the full length of the handle and the side profile of the wedge-shaped blade.
description_view_2: The back of the axe is visible, emphasizing the poll of the head and the handle's ergonomic curve.
description_view_3: A side view displaying the broad blade edge and the full extension of the handle.
attribute_handle_type: Curved wooden handle with an ergonomic grip, oval cross-section, and a smooth, natural finish.
attribute_blade_design: Single-edged, wedge-shaped steel blade with a broad poll and no decorative features.
attribute_mounting_style: Traditional wedged mounting with the handle passing through the eye of the blade.
